demo.title: receipt.sh
demo.code:
# Make a paid agent call and get a receipt that binds input -> output -> payment.
# pay-then-prove: you send the USDC yourself, then prove the tx (IronBridge holds no key).
bankr prompt "Use ironbridge-receipt: run bnkr_llm_chat, I'll pay 0.1 USDC on Base and give you the tx hash, return the receipt + /proof URL"

# Trending DEX tokens with a receipt you can hand to anyone:
bankr prompt "Use ironbridge-receipt on solvr_dex_trending and return the result plus its receipt id"

# Then verify it for free with the ironbridge-verify skill.

setup: Fund a Base wallet with USDC (lane price is 0.1 USDC/call) plus ~$0.01 ETH for gas.
Scheme is pay-then-prove (NOT auto-settle x402): POST the lane, get 402 with a receiver + price, send USDC to the receiver on Base, then resend the SAME request with header X-IB-Payment-Tx: <txHash>.
IronBridge never takes custody of your wallet — you sign your own USDC transfer.
The response carries a receipt id; verify it any time (free) with the ironbridge-verify skill.
